instructions: ["Preheat the oven to 200°C.","Cut vegetables and protein into similar-sized pieces.","Toss everything with oil, garlic, herbs and seasoning.","Spread on a tray in a single layer.","Roast until golden and cooked through, turning once.","Serve with rice, potatoes or a simple salad."]

name: Sweet Potato Black Bean Tacos
imgQ: Sweet Potato Black Bean Tacos recipe
instructions: ["Prepare and chop all ingredients.","Heat oil in a large pan and sauté the aromatics.","Add the main protein or vegetables and cook until browned.","Add sauce, seasoning and a splash of water if needed.","Simmer or toss until everything is cooked through.","Serve hot with the suggested side."]

name: Black Bean Enchilada Bake
instructions: ["Preheat the oven to 190°C.","Prepare the sauce, vegetables and main protein or legumes.","Combine everything in a baking dish with the chosen carb.","Cover and bake until bubbling and tender.","Uncover for the final minutes to brown the top lightly.","Rest briefly before serving."]

name: Vegetarian Bean Chili
instructions: ["Chop the vegetables and season the main protein or legumes.","Sauté onion and garlic in olive oil until soft.","Add the protein, legumes or vegetables and brown lightly if needed.","Add tomato, stock and spices, then simmer gently.","Cook until the sauce thickens and everything is tender.","Serve with rice, potatoes or bread as preferred."]

name: Vegan Three-Bean Chili
instructions: ["Chop the vegetables and season the main protein or legumes.","Sauté onion and garlic in olive oil until soft.","Add the protein, legumes or vegetables and brown lightly if needed.","Add tomato, stock and spices, then simmer gently.","Cook until the sauce thickens and everything is tender.","Serve with rice, potatoes or bread as preferred."]

name: Mushroom and Spinach Risotto with Olive Oil
imgQ: Mushroom and Spinach Risotto with Olive Oil recipe
instructions: ["Warm the stock in a separate pan.","Sauté onion, garlic and mushrooms in olive oil.","Add rice and toast for 1 minute.","Add stock gradually, stirring often.","Cook until creamy and the rice is tender.","Finish with herbs, olive oil and black pepper."]

name: Lentil Bolognese
instructions: ["Cook the pasta until al dente.","Sauté onion, garlic and vegetables in olive oil.","Add legumes or protein and cook through.","Stir in tomato sauce and simmer until thickened.","Toss pasta with the sauce and loosen with pasta water if needed.","Serve with herbs and black pepper."]
